code:
%%{Security_Encryption}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [Security_Encryption] --> Pending: TodoCreated
    Pending --> InProgress: TodoStarted
    Pending --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    InProgress --> Completed: TodoCompleted
    InProgress --> Cancelled: TodoCancelled
    Completed --> InProgress: TodoReopened
    Cancelled --> Pending: TodoReopened
    
    state Pending {Security_Encryption] --> NoDueDate
        NoDueDate --> DueDate: TodoDueDateSet
        DueDate --> Overdue: DueDatePassed
        DueDate --> NoDueDate: TodoDueDateRemoved
    }
    
    state InProgress {Security_Firewall] --> LowPriority
        LowPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        LowPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        MediumPriority --> HighPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> LowPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
        HighPriority --> MediumPriority: TodoPriorityChanged
    }
    
    classDef pending fill:#FFC107,stroke:#FFA000,color:black
    classDef inprogress fill:#2196F3,stroke:#1976D2,color:white
    classDef completed fill:#4CAF50,stroke:#388E3C,color:white
    classDef cancelled fill:#9E9E9E,stroke:#616161,color:white
    
    class Pending pending
    class InProgress inprogress
    class Completed completed
    class Cancelled cancelled

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个待办事项的状态流转图，核心是要体现安全加密模块的介入。我想从Security_Encryption开始，初始状态是Pending，触发条件是TodoCreated。
明白，Security_Encryption作为入口。Pending之后有哪些分支？是只能进入InProgress，还是可以被取消？
Pending可以有两个出口：一个是TodoStarted进入InProgress，另一个是TodoCancelled直接进入Cancelled。另外InProgress完成之后要能回到Completed，但Completed也可以重新打开回到InProgress。
好的，主状态流转已搭建：Pending↔InProgress↔Completed，加上Cancelled的往返。现在处理子状态，Pending内部需要处理截止日期逻辑吗？
对，Pending内部要有Security_Encryption指向的NoDueDate和DueDate两个子状态，可以设置截止日期，也可以移除。DueDate过期后要变成Overdue。
确认一下：Pending子状态里，Security_Encryption作为起点，NoDueDate和DueDate互转，DueDate单向到Overdue。那InProgress内部呢？
InProgress内部用Security_Firewall作为起点，有三个优先级子状态：LowPriority、MediumPriority、HighPriority，它们之间可以任意切换，都是TodoPriorityChanged触发的。
子状态结构已完成。最后需要给四个主状态加上样式：Pending用琥珀色#FFC107，InProgress用蓝色#2196F3，Completed绿色，Cancelled灰色。
样式没问题。整体结构检查一遍：Security_Encryption入口、双向主状态流转、Pending的截止日期子状态、InProgress的优先级子状态，还有Cancelled也能通过TodoReopened回到Pending。可以定稿了。
